name: smartwarehouse-frontend-platform
description: Owner frontend platform workspace for SmartWarehouse-AI.

scripts.build: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm build:apps && corepack pnpm build:docs
scripts.build:packages: corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-types build && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-theme build && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-sdk build && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-ui build
scripts.build:apps: corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/portal-shell build && corepack pnpm build:remotes
scripts.build:remotes: corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/sys-web build && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/wms-web build && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/mes-web build && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/ai-web build
scripts.publish:dry-run:snapshot: corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-types publish --tag snapshot --no-git-checks --dry-run && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-theme publish --tag snapshot --no-git-checks --dry-run && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-sdk publish --tag snapshot --no-git-checks --dry-run && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-ui publish --tag snapshot --no-git-checks --dry-run
scripts.publish:dry-run:release: corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-types publish --no-git-checks --dry-run && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-theme publish --no-git-checks --dry-run && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-sdk publish --no-git-checks --dry-run && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-ui publish --no-git-checks --dry-run
scripts.publish:snapshot: corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-types publish --tag snapshot --no-git-checks && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-theme publish --tag snapshot --no-git-checks && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-sdk publish --tag snapshot --no-git-checks && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-ui publish --tag snapshot --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:release: corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-types publish --no-git-checks && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-theme publish --no-git-checks && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-sdk publish --no-git-checks && corepack pnpm --filter @smartwarehouse/platform-ui publish --no-git-checks
